description: Extract structured insights from videos, podcasts, articles, and PDFs with multi-model AI

headers.description: CoreWise API key as a Bearer token, e.g. 'Bearer cw_live_...'. Create one at https://corewise.video/profile under 'API & MCP Keys'. Optional: public library search works without a key; extract_url requires one.
